problem id: ba47a3bf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHL(6)

examples:
  00100101 -> 00000000
  00011001 -> 00000000
  00101110 -> 00000000
  11100001 -> 01000000
  00111100 -> 00000000
  10001101 -> 01000000
  01001011 -> 10000000
  01111000 -> 00000000
  01110100 -> 00000000

query: 11110001
predicted answer: 01000000
